list: The Audit Committee will review the selection of the audit firm (if applicable), review and recommend to accept the audit to the Board of Directors in compliance wtih the appropriate audit standards

The Fiscal Committee will recommend to the Board policies regarding fiscal matters, including but not limited to operations, support, review of its budget and modifications. The committee will approve the annual budget process and recommend approving the budget to the Board of Directors
The Personnel Committee will develop and recommend to the Board policies regarding personnel such as hiring, termination, evaluations, salaries, grievances, and employee benefits

The Nominating committee will assist with the annual election process in conjunction with ASI and will review eligible candidates and nominate a replacement in the case of a vacancy of a student director to the Board
